title: Generate a customer service brief from account evidence
given: A CRM account has sales orders, shipments, recent activities, and optional incident or invoice-audit signals.
when: The user selects the account and creates a customer intelligence brief.
then: The assistant persists an AssistantCustomerBrief with service score, promise status, operations summary, risk summary, evidence, redaction metadata, and a customer-ready reply draft.

title: Withhold sensitive finance and partner details
given: The brief includes invoice, margin, supplier, carrier, or variance language and the user is not authorized for sensitive details.
then: Customer-facing text redacts sensitive finance/commercial/partner details while preserving safe service status.

title: Approve an editable customer reply without auto-sending
given: A generated customer brief has an editable reply draft.
then: The approved reply is persisted, an activity-log payload and assistant audit event are recorded, and an action queue item is created for send review without sending an external message.
